summary: Core Wave 1 signals are healthy enough for cautious release, but defect/blocker penalties and depth gaps remain.
critical_green_signals: Auth phase inferred green from successful user/merchant/admin cross-surface evidence.
Order core green from lifecycle report and deterministic order seed.
Search + Store suite is present and evidence indicates mostly green behavior.
Lifecycle flow is usable with deterministic order seed and merchant visibility.
Admin consistency phase is green with no reported inconsistencies.

product_defect_penalties.title: Invalid store lookup returns 500 instead of controlled 400/404
Invalid store uniqueId lookup returns 500 instead of controlled 400/404

env_blocker_penalties.title: Stripe webhook secret/signing alignment blocked in runtime

coverage_gap_penalties.title: Merchant transition depth partially seed-blocked (13 slots missing)
Payment webhook realism coverage is incomplete

decision_reasoning: Core phases are green but defect/blocker penalties reduce certainty.
Known product defects remain open and are explicitly penalized.
Environment blockers are separated from product defects and penalized moderately.
Coverage depth remains incomplete for merchant/payment realism paths.
known_product_defects: Invalid store lookup returns 500 instead of controlled 400/404
Invalid store uniqueId lookup returns 500 instead of controlled 400/404
env_blockers: Stripe webhook secret/signing alignment blocked in runtime
coverage_gaps: Merchant transition depth partially seed-blocked (13 slots missing)
Payment webhook realism coverage is incomplete
release_risk_factors: Core phases are green but defect/blocker penalties reduce certainty.
Known product defects remain open and are explicitly penalized.
Environment blockers are separated from product defects and penalized moderately.
Coverage depth remains incomplete for merchant/payment realism paths.
recommended_actions_before_release: Fix STORE-API-004 negative-path regression so invalid store lookups return controlled 400/404.
Align deployed Stripe webhook secret/signing path with QA runtime to unblock payment realism checks.
Unlock merchant state seeds for transition-depth and terminal-state verification.
recommended_actions_after_release: Monitor store lookup 5xx rate and invalid-lookup error handling.
Monitor payment callback anomalies until full webhook realism coverage is stable.
Keep merchant transition reruns in nightly cycle until seed depth is fully deterministic.
